# E5 — Planning Model & Flexibility

Improve the planning model and reduce process rigidity: flexible VP↔TH mapping, story priority/size, proportional ceremonies, fast-track for trivial stories.

## Stories

| ID | Title | Priority | Depends On |
|----|-------|----------|------------|
| TH1.E5.US1 | Relax VP-to-TH mapping to 1:N | P2 | TH1.E1.US1 |
| TH1.E5.US2 | Add priority field to stories | P2 | TH1.E1.US1 |
| TH1.E5.US3 | Add size/complexity field | P2 | TH1.E1.US1 |
| TH1.E5.US4 | Fix or remove blocked status | P3 | TH1.E1.US1 |
| TH1.E5.US5 | Proportional ceremony overhead | P2 | TH1.E2.US3 |
| TH1.E5.US6 | Fast-track trivial stories | P2 | TH1.E5.US2 |
| TH1.E5.US7 | Simplify regression testing | P3 | TH1.E2.US1 |
